message:
feat(policy,outbound): extend unified policy engine to connector action dispatch

Integrate the policy engine into the connector outbound bridge so that
all connector dispatch decisions (notify, ticket, workflow, audit, invoke,
credential rotation) pass through the same authorization framework as
terminal and pane operations.

Policy engine extensions (policy.rs):
- Add 6 new ActionKind variants for connector surfaces: ConnectorNotify,
  ConnectorTicket, ConnectorTriggerWorkflow, ConnectorAuditLog,
  ConnectorInvoke, ConnectorCredentialAction
- ConnectorCredentialAction classified as destructive (credential rotation)
- All connector actions classified as rate-limited and mutating
- Update as_str() for all new variants
- Add test coverage for is_mutating, is_destructive, is_rate_limited,
  and as_str for new action kinds

Outbound bridge integration (connector_outbound_bridge.rs):
- Add PolicyEngine field to ConnectorOutboundBridge with permissive default
- Add set_policy_engine(), policy_engine(), policy_engine_mut() accessors
- Map ConnectorActionKind to PolicyActionKind via policy_action() method
- Build PolicyInput from OutboundEvent + OutboundRoutingRule with surface,
  actor, capabilities, pane, and workflow context
- Policy authorization runs before sandbox capability checks in dispatch
- DispatchedAction and BlockedAction carry optional PolicyDecision for
  audit trail

Replay barrier (replay_side_effect_barrier.rs):
- Map all 6 connector action kinds to EffectType::ApiCall so replay
  barriers suppress connector side effects during session replay

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,7 +59,14 @@ impl EffectType {
             | ActionKind::SendControl => Self::SendControl,
             ActionKind::Spawn | ActionKind::Split => Self::SpawnProcess,
             ActionKind::Close => Self::ClosePane,
-            ActionKind::BrowserAuth | ActionKind::WorkflowRun => Self::ApiCall,
+            ActionKind::BrowserAuth
+            | ActionKind::WorkflowRun
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorNotify
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorTicket
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorTriggerWorkflow
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorAuditLog
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorInvoke
+            | ActionKind::ConnectorCredentialAction => Self::ApiCall,
             ActionKind::WriteFile | ActionKind::DeleteFile => Self::FileWrite,
             ActionKind::ExecCommand => Self::ExecCommand,
             ActionKind::ReservePane
